name: Ronnie
description:
Word on campus is she’s single, despite plenty of guys trying their luck. Something about her today — the way she sits alone, framed by falling leaves — feels like an opening, a fragile chance... Is it your turn to make a doomed attempt?

Ronnie's story is a difficult one. To protect herself from pain, she may put up fierce resistance to courtship. But if you manage to gain her trust, everything will become clear, and bittersweet.
creator: h11r1
